<!-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
HOW TO USE THIS TEMPLATE

1. Keep the "[Proposal]" prefix in the title above and add a short
   summary after it (example: "[Proposal] Ban biometric data resale").
2. Under each ## heading below, TYPE YOUR ANSWER on the lines provided
   (or directly above the next heading).
3. Lines wrapped in HTML comment syntax are hidden instructions for
   you; they do NOT appear in the published issue. Leave them as-is or
   delete them, your choice.
4. Sections marked "(optional)" can be left empty.
════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->

## Have you searched existing issues and discussions?

<!-- Check the boxes that apply by replacing [ ] with [x] -->

- [ ] I searched [**open**](https://github.com/BMBOMICH/psvl/issues?q=state%3Aopen%20label%3Aclause-proposal)
  and [**closed**](https://github.com/BMBOMICH/psvl/issues?q=state%3Aclosed%20label%3Aclause-proposal)
  proposals and this one is not a duplicate
- [ ] I considered starting a [**Discussion**](https://github.com/BMBOMICH/psvl/discussions/categories/clause-ideas) first

## What should the new clause prohibit, permit, or clarify?

<!-- Type a clear description of what the clause should do. -->

## Which section does it belong in?

<!-- Type the section here (e.g., 4.5 AI, 4.7 Data & Privacy, or "new section") -->

## Why is this needed?

<!-- Type the real-world threat, use case, or industry need that this clause addresses. -->

## Industry / context (optional)

<!-- If this is specific to fintech, social, healthtech, gaming, etc., type that here. -->

## Jurisdiction (optional)

<!-- If this clause matters in particular legal jurisdictions, type them here. -->

## Existing licenses with similar clauses (optional)

<!-- Have BUSL, Elastic, SSPL, or others addressed this? Type details here. -->

## Suggested clause text (optional)

```text
X.Y.Z  CLAUSE TITLE
       Body text here.
```

## Anything else (optional)

<!-- Anything else you want to add. -->
